response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:11: Identified opening crowd scene with no vocals. 2. 00:11: Song '太陽系デスコ' (Taiyoukei Disco) detected, performed by Tokino Sora. 3. Confirmed composer/lyrics as 'ナユタン星人' (Nayutalien) via search. 4. Performed searches for lyrics in Japanese and English translation. 5. Consolidated lyrics from search results into the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A high-energy live concert performance of the song 'Taiyoukei Disco' (Solar System Disco) by the virtual idol Tokino Sora. The video features a large audience with glowsticks.

scenes.description: The video opens with a shot of the concert audience waving light sticks in the dark. The stage is visible in the background, but no vocals have started yet.
Tokino Sora begins the performance of the song 'Taiyoukei Disco'. She dances and sings on stage while the crowd cheers. The stage has colorful, futuristic visuals throughout the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Under the shimmering light of that first-magnitude star, shall I dance with you?
Let's match our steps to the heartbeat of my solar system, sparkling as we get tangled, star!

Lambada, Rumba, the two of us, a rendezvous in the universe
Delusional, suffering, sleepless all night
Becoming a constellation, mixing together
No first-magnitude star has a luminosity that can replace you

I found you that day behind the school building
Even that miracle, I still can't let go
Even the Pluto that I see frequently next to me
Unfortunately, I'm not interested in it now

The stars are dancing, my chest is pounding, and before I knew it, I was far away---

Under the shimmering light of that first-magnitude star, shall I dance with you?
Invited by the laws of my solar system, sparkling with our intertwined sensitivity, star!

Oh, oh, oh! Connecting the interstellar lines (Oh, oh, oh!)
Delivering to you (Oh, oh, oh!)
From the ends of the universe (Oh, oh, oh!)
You, invading system!

Nana-na, nana-na, nana-na, nya-nya-nya-nya-nya-nya-nya
Nana-na, nana-na, nana-na

Most dances, the stars shine and become signposts, with inexperienced steps HA, HA, HA, HA,
With a bold stance, tracing the orbital path, in the solar system's disco HA, HA, HA, HA,
Drifting in space, someday the two of us will forget, even the words I want to seek now
Even a world where the supernova was wished for and set, strangely, I don't care now
Even if there's nothing, even if it's just somehow, the stars are circling---

The unreachable light of that first-magnitude star, sparkled in the far distance
Even deviating from the laws of my solar system, "Even so, it's fine" reaching out!

Come, with the feelings I've held for eons, shall I seek all of you?
Hey, on a vast journey of how many light-years, shall we search for the love logic of a pair of wings?

Under the shimmering light of that first-magnitude star, shall I dance with you?
Look, Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune too, sparkling in our galaxy, star!

Oh, oh, oh! Connecting the interstellar lines (Oh, oh, oh!)
Delivering to you (Oh, oh, oh!)
From the ends of the universe (Oh, oh, oh!)

[Repeat chorus and verses as per original song structure]",reference_lyrics_og:
